audit_input.task_goal: make the half-cheetah run forward quickly with stable locomotion

audit_output.reason: The task goal requires 'stable locomotion,' but no video was provided to verify this. The current reward function only incentivizes forward_velocity without any regularization for energy cost or stability. This setup commonly leads to reward hacking where the agent achieves high velocity through unstable, unnatural, or high-energy movements (e.g., flipping, sliding) rather than stable running.
